title: MagicStructure
description: Add trees, dungeons, new buildings, and flying islands from schematics to your world generation.
body:
# MagicStructures
![Change the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e09822b9bf094a2b4d9c681aae2417ee6d8063d_0.webp)
![Create dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c226aca8df1e1a37c91dc67aeb6a56e3c9e0184b_0.webp)
![Add vegetation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0d052fef3e705dc5c68cfea76119150d5a974e_0.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YiKqXPogvlc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Change your world beyond recognition with your schematics

[How to get started](https://test-963.gitbook.io/magicstructures-wiki)

With this plugin, you can generate structures, trees, dungeons, etc. using schematics. Now world generation will be on your terms.

This is the first plugin that allows you to optimize the insertion of schematics into the world using your settings.

The plugin supports structures from the smallest to the largest.

The plugin also supports datapacks with their own custom biomes.
